title: Bitter Egyptian Banana Stir-fry
description: A silky midnight-craving dish featuring banana, a blend of aromatic spices including bhuna, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: Heat a little oil in a pan, add cumin seeds and mustard seeds. Roast them until they start spluttering.
Add ginger and green chilies, stir-fry for about 1 minute.
Cut the banana into small slices or dice if it's large. Add them to the pan with the spices, stirring well.
Sprinkle bhuna masala powder over the mixture, salt according to taste. Stir gently to combine all ingredients evenly.
Continue cooking until the banana is just cooked through and slightly softened, about 5-7 minutes more. Adjust seasoning if necessary.
Remove from heat, serve hot with a side of yogurt or a dollop of ghee (clarified butter) for extra richness.
